title: Bazaar Utils Clear GUI
description: Clear GUI textures for Bazaar Utils! More colors will be added in the future.
body:
This texture pack re-textures the bazaar utils GUI textures to make them look clear. I'm also adding colors to match texture packs and appeal to people's preferences. More colors will be added in the future.

**Link for Bazaar Utils**
https://modrinth.com/mod/bazaar-utils

Side Notes: I'm also going to be doing this with more Skyblock mods like Skyblocker and Firmament. Also the I put the license on this as "Public Domain" so feel free to do whatever you want with this texture pack. You can also change the colors so that it perfectly fits your liking if you want. It is all up to you.
